# Pull Request Template

## Summary

_What does this change do? Why was it needed? If AI-generated, include the prompt or tool used._

> e.g. "Adds utility to normalize dates in report generation. Generated using GPT-4 with unit test scaffolding included."

---

## Test Plan

_How did you test this? Are there new or updated tests?_

> e.g. "Tested with `yarn test`, added two unit cases in `reportUtils.test.ts`."

---

## AI Involvement

- [ ] AI-generated code
- [ ] AI-assisted code review
- [ ] No AI involved

_If AI-generated, summarize the process briefly:_

> e.g. "Used Copilot Chat to scaffold initial logic and refine tests."

---

## Review Tier Suggestion

> _Based on the rubric in `REVIEW_GUIDELINES.md`_

- [ ] Tier 0 – Automated (no human review)
- [ ] Tier 1 – Light Review
- [ ] Tier 2 – Deep Review

---

## Checklist

- [ ] Code is readable and clearly structured
- [ ] PR includes rationale and test plan
- [ ] No sensitive credentials or hardcoded secrets
- [ ] Changes are minimal and scoped to purpose
- [ ] I’ve reviewed potential risks and edge cases

---
